passage.title: A Day with Revision of Days 51-59
passage.text: He said that he was tired. She asked where I lived. You are coming, aren't you? Ram is the tallest. This is the most interesting book. I need a book. The sun rises in the east. If you work hard, you will succeed. If I had money, I would buy this house. If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
passage.hindiTranslation: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था। उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था। तुम आ रहे हो, है ना? राम सबसे लंबा है। यह सबसे दिलचस्प किताब है। मुझे एक किताब चाहिए। सूरज पूरब से निकलता है। अगर तुम मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे। अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता। अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "He said that he..."?
options: If you work hard, you will succeed.

She asked where I lived.

comprehensionQuestions.answer: He said that he was tired.
